sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n67562" key="mhtranoi/kths" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μητρ-ανοίκτης</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ου</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <sense id="n67562.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">instrument for opening the womb, Hermes</tr_> <bibl n="urn:cts:greekLit:tlg0031.tlg015.perseus-grc1:38:282" default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">38.282</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
